CustomField.description:
Drafted by the individual, ideally before the half-year review with the line manager - a short text summary of progress against objectives, assistance required to overcome challenges.
The 6-month review is also an opportunity to review whether the objectives need additions, or amendments in agreement based on new insights or context.
Specific actions agreed in the half-year review may be documented here
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Drafted by the individual, ideally before the half-year review with the line manager - a short text summary of progress against objectives, assistance required to overcome challenges.
CustomField.label: Half-Year Review - Individual Comments
